name: Alaris Holdings Limited
summary: Alaris Holdings Limited designs, manufactures, and sells specialized broadband antennas and other related radio frequency products primarily in South Africa, the United States, Europe, and Asia. The company operates through Alaris Antennas and COJOT segments. It serves system integrators, frequency spectrum regulators, and players in the homeland security space for use in the communication, frequency spectrum monitoring, test and measurement, electronic warfare, and other specialized markets; and military and public safety markets. The company was formerly known as Poynting Holdings Limited and changed its name to Alaris Holdings Limited in May 2015. Alaris Holdings Limited was founded in 1990 and is based in Centurion, South Africa.
